coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 1,748-node root closure and its 256-case Marching Cubes lookup table.
validation: Exact Blender topology at 2,867 vertices and 5,376 faces. Cyclic NURBS evaluation now starts on Blender's second-control span, rebuilds evaluated tangents instead of remapping stale control tangents, and sweeps the 9,324-point tube within 0.000014 units of Blender. Scale Elements uses element-center weighting for the four cone fans, aligning the Marching Cubes bounds and final local bounds within 0.0001 units.
